metadata.title: Churro Coder — AI Coding Agent Client
metadata.description: Run Claude Code, Codex, and more — locally or in the cloud. The opinionated open-source AI coding client. Create applications like churros.
metadata.keywords: AI coding agent, Claude Code, Codex, developer tools, open source

hero.title: Create applications
hero.subtitle: Run Claude Code, Codex, and more — locally or in the cloud. The opinionated AI coding client that makes shipping software fast, precise, and actually enjoyable.

features.title: Everything you need to code with AI
features.subtitle: Built for developers who want speed, control, and zero compromise on quality.

multiProvider.title: Multi-Provider Support
multiProvider.description: Switch between Claude Code and Codex mid-conversation. Always use the best model for the task at hand.

planMode.title: Plan Before You Code
planMode.description: Read-only analysis mode lets the AI survey your codebase and propose a plan before writing a single line.

agentMode.title: Full Agent Autonomy
agentMode.description: Let the AI write files, run bash commands, search the web, and iterate — all in real-time, right on your machine.

localFirst.title: Local-First & Private
localFirst.description: No cloud sync, no analytics, no mandatory login. Your code and conversations stay on your machine.

gitIntegration.title: Native Git Integration
gitIntegration.description: Branch management, pull request creation, and conflict resolution built right into the workflow.

realTime.title: Real-Time Execution
realTime.description: Watch AI execute commands, edit files, and make decisions as it happens. Full transparency, always.

workflow.title: How Churro Coder works
workflow.subtitle: An opinionated, four-step workflow that keeps you in control at every stage.

plan.label: Plan
plan.title: Analyze & Plan
plan.description: The AI reads your codebase and creates a detailed, step-by-step plan. You approve it before a single file changes.

code.label: Code
code.title: Execute & Iterate
code.description: The agent writes files, runs commands, and iterates in real-time. Every decision is transparent and observable.

review.label: Review
review.title: Inspect Changes
review.description: See live diffs of every change. Approve, request modifications, or roll back with one click.

pr.label: PR
pr.title: Ship It
pr.description: Push to your branch and open a pull request directly from the app. From idea to PR in minutes.

screenshots.title: See it in action
screenshots.subtitle: A complete AI-powered development environment that runs on your machine.

cta.title: Ready to ship faster?
cta.subtitle: Join developers who are building with AI, the right way. Free and open source.

footer.tagline: The opinionated open-source AI coding agent client.
